---
title: "Courses"
description: "Course materials from Connor L. Brown, including an Introduction to R for Field Ecology."
editor: visual
toc: true
number-sections: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>#title-block-header .description { display: none; }</style>
---

# Field Ecology

-   [Intro to R](courses/field_ecology/intro2r/Intro2RPres.qmd)
